chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No. D-1782 of 2023 (Muhammad Mobeen Rajput Vs. Federation of Pakistan & others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on CMA No. 15/2024 (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection. 3. For Orders on CMA No. 7708/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case. 11-01-2024. Syed Tarique Hussain Shah, Advocate for the petitioner ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4. The petitioner by way of instant petition has sought for direction against the respondents to restore / connect the electric supply to inhabitants of Nau-Goath Sukkur, which they have disconnected since three months as it is violation of human / fundamental rights. SEPCO is the Company, which is supplying the electricity to its customers on payment, if such supply is disconnected then possibly it may be on account of default in payment; therefore, such issue could not be probed or resolved by this Court under the garb of violation of human / fundamental rights by way of instant petition; same being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
